# Harrison Vance
> Cloud & DevOps Engineer | Infrastructure Security | SRE Precision

## Profile
Harrison is a veteran Cloud & DevOps Engineer with 5+ years of experience architecting secure, observable, and autonomous ecosystems. Expert in institutional-grade AWS landing zones, high-frequency trading infrastructure, and self-healing Kubernetes clusters.

## Core Technical Ecosystem
- **Cloud & Infra:** AWS (SAP Certified), GCP, Terraform (Core Contributor), Kubernetes, ArgoCD, Docker.
- **DevOps:** GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Ansible, n8n, Linux (Advanced), Bash.
- **Languages:** Go, Python, Solidity, FastAPI.
- **Data & Metrics:** PostgreSQL, Redis, Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry.

## Featured Portfolio
- **Algorithmic Trading Engine:** Sub-10ms execution engine with dynamic risk parity.
- **AWS Bedrock AI Agent:** Autonomous AI orchestration for cloud troubleshooting.
- **Self-Healing EKS Cluster:** Kubernetes fault-injection and recovery system with 99.99% SLA.
- **Enterprise AWS Landing Zone:** Zero-trust OIDC baseline for institutional scale.

## Experience Details
- High-fidelity incident response and postmortem documentation.
- Specialized in API resiliency and failure analysis.
- Proven track record of 5-year normalized high-velocity contributions.
- USA & APAC compatible.
